divergence_notes: vs jayyhk: AP encoded with the house predicate Set.IsAPOfLength (⊤ : ℕ∞) on Set ℕ instead of a bespoke InfiniteAP structure; infinite cardinality forces d ≥ 1, so no explicit d_pos field is needed.
vs jayyhk: no first-term positivity constraint (jayyhk requires a_pos : 1 ≤ a; the problem text does not, and a = 0 progressions are mathematically harmless since cycle lengths are ≥ 3).
vs jayyhk: average degree is the house SimpleGraph.averageDegree = (∑ deg v)/|V| : ℚ, not 2|E|/|V| (equal by the handshake lemma but definitionally different).
vs jayyhk: the constant c is bound as c : ℚ (matching the ℚ-valued averageDegree) instead of c : ℕ cast to ℚ; equivalent in strength by rounding up.
vs jayyhk: no [Nonempty V] hypothesis; the empty graph has averageDegree 0 and any witness c can be taken positive, so nonemptiness is not needed.
vs jayyhk: 'cycle whose length is in P' stated directly as w.IsCycle ∧ w.length ∈ P rather than via HasCycleOfLength/HasCycleOfLengthMod auxiliary definitions.
vs jayyhk: quantifies V : Type (Type 0) rather than V : Type*, per FC ErdosProblems house style (e.g. 128, 594, 619, 1080).
